steps.t: Needy and hungry animals can be found in the village of Long Cleeve. You should care for the needy and hungry animals in Long Cleeve.
Prunella Goldworthy can be found in the village of Long Cleeve. You should talk to Prunella Goldworthy.
Injured animals can be found in the village of Long Cleeve. You should care for the injured animals in Long Cleeve.
Prunella Goldworthy can be found in the village of Long Cleeve. You should talk to Prunella Goldworthy.
